role: A small presentational toggle control that shows a live/frozen state and lets the user flip it.
capabilities: Apply an address stamp to the control
Provide dynamic aria-label and title based on state
substance_why: It fully implements the live indicator + freeze toggle UI: styled button, click handler, accessible labels, and address stamp.
interactions_present: Click/tap the button to toggle live/frozen
interactions_missing: No screen-reader live-region announcement on state change
No actual stream pause/resume logic (only a boolean prop)
performance_risks: Re-renders whenever parent re-renders with no memoization
Recomputes className string and stamp call on every render
reuse_verdict_why: Keep the live/frozen concept and toggle behavior, but rebuild styling, focus, and accessibility during redesign.
decomposition_hints: No split needed — the file is already a single-purpose control
